drl:
rule "R0"
salience -4
no-loop
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f0 != true, $b0_0_0 : f2)
    $p0_1 : T0(f1 != true, f0 != false, $b0_1_0 : f0, $b0_1_1 : f2, f1 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p0_0.getF2(), $p0_0.isF1()));
    $p0_1.setF1(true);
    $p0_1.setF0(true);
    $p0_1.setF2(-4);
    update($p0_1);
end
rule "R1"
when
    ( T0(f2 not in (12, 9, 0.0), f1 != true, $b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f0) and T1(f1 == true, f1 == true, f1 != $b1_0_0) and exists T1(f1 == true, f1 == $b1_0_1) )
    or
    ( T0(f2 not in (12, 9, 0.0), f2 < 0.5, $b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f0, f1 != true) and T1(f1 == true, f1 in (false, false, false), f1 != $b1_0_0) and exists T1(f0 in (7, 9), f1 == $b1_0_1) )
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T1($b2_0_0 : f1)
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
name: fz_123_941
